description: Return the unread mail count for sessions selected by selector without draining mail.

all_namespaces.description: Bypass namespace scoping and read across all namespaces.

namespace.description: Namespace slug to scope this read. Overrides the caller session namespace fallback.

selector.description:
Inbox owner selector used for matching sessions.

Grammar:
  all
  <uuid>
  id:<uuid>
  role:<name>
  namespace:<slug>
  dir:<path>
  label:<key>=<value>
  label:<key> in (v1, v2)
Examples:
  all
  019e44f9-...
  role:engineer
  namespace:default
  dir:/tmp/project
  label:app=nginx
  "label:app in (web, api)"

name: mail_check
